dedup.method: doc-level exact sha256 over utf-8 text, source-local

est_tokens_note: bytes/4 HEURISTIC ONLY, not the AC token count — v0-tokenizer counts land after the tokenizer trains on the stratified corpus sample and freezes (fp-22 §1, mail 14523)

license_stamp.basis: RECEIPTED — fp-6/eng-70 per-record stamps via ledger_license.effective_class; qwen-research class EXCLUDED (fp-6 boundary); fp-22 §1 row 5

sha_convention: sha256 over on-disk raw bytes (binary read, no line-ending normalization)
